sentences.arabic: أَعَادَ التَّحَوُّلُ نَحْوَ الْعَمَلِ عَنْ بُعْدٍ صِيَاغَةَ الْحُدُودِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ لِلْبِيئَةِ الْمِهَنِيَّةِ الْمُعَاصِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prelazak na rad na daljinu redefinirao je tradicionalne granice savremenog profesionalnog okruženja.
sentences.translationEn: The shift toward remote work has redefined the traditional boundaries of the contemporary professional environment.

sentences.arabic: رَغْمَ أَنَّ الْمُرُونَةَ تُعَدُّ مِيزَةً كُبْرَى، إِلَّا أَنَّهَا تَسْتَوْجِبُ مُسْتَوَيَاتٍ عَالِيَةً مِنَ الِانْضِبَاطِ الذَّاتِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Iako se fleksibilnost smatra velikom prednošću, ona zahtijeva visoke nivoe samodiscipline.
sentences.translationEn: Although flexibility is considered a major advantage, it necessitates high levels of self-discipline.

sentences.arabic: تُعَزَّزُ الْإِنْتَاجِيَّةُ غَالِبًا عِنْدَمَا يَتِمُّ تَوْفِيرُ الْأَدَوَاتِ الَّتِي تُسَهِّلُ التَّعَاوُنَ الرَّقْمِيَّ بَيْنَ الْفِرَقِ.
sentences.translation: Produktivnost se često povećava kada se obezbijede alati koji olakšavaju digitalnu saradnju između timova.
sentences.translationEn: Productivity is often enhanced when tools are provided that facilitate digital collaboration between teams.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ مُعَالَجَةُ التَّحَدِّيَاتِ مِثْلَ الْعُزْلَةِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ مِنْ خِلَالِ أَنْشِطَةِ بِنَاءِ الْفَرِيقِ الِافْتِرَاضِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Izazovi poput socijalne izolacije moraju se rješavati kroz virtuelne aktivnosti izgradnje tima.
sentences.translationEn: Challenges such as social isolation must be addressed through virtual team-building activities.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا، يَكْمُنُ مُسْتَقْبَلُ الْعَمَلِ فِي نَمُوذَجٍ هَجِينٍ يُوَازِنُ بَيْنَ الِاسْتِقْلَالِيَّةِ وَالْعَمَلِ الْجَمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Tako budućnost rada leži u hibridnom modelu koji balansira između autonomije i kolektivnog rada.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the future of work lies in a hybrid model that balances autonomy and teamwork.
